# Packages for the editor domain on Debian/Ubuntu.
# Consume with: xargs -a deps/packages.apt.txt sudo apt install -y

neovim
lazygit
nodejs
npm
git
curl
ripgrep
fd-find
gcc
make
unzip

# Notes:
# - On Debian 13+, neovim is in the official repos.
# - On Ubuntu, neovim may need a PPA for newer versions.
# - fd-find on Debian installs binary as 'fdfind'; LazyVim handles it.
